## Quality checklist

- [ ] All files I touched are ≤200 lines
- [ ] No `@ts-ignore` or suppressed errors
- [ ] No placeholder code (`// ... rest`)
- [ ] No raw SQL in controllers (PHP)
- [ ] No `useEffect` for data fetching (React)
- [ ] PHP: `declare(strict_types=1)` present on new files
- [ ] Input validation present on API endpoints
- [ ] `npm run build` passes (frontend changes)
- [ ] `php -l` passes on changed PHP files
